signal: 记忆整合 cron (320cca06) failed with 'Edit: in SOUL.md (26 chars) failed'. Root cause: consolidation agent tried to add content that already existed in SOUL.md (2026-03-18 反思 section). Idempotent edit failure — the desired content is present, but the cron reported error.
action: Cron prompt updated: added edit idempotency + read-before-edit + one retry on oldText mismatch. Goal: avoid turning no-op SOUL.md updates into cron errors. Verify on next run (2026-03-22 03:00).
evidence_170: Cycle evt_170 (3/21 21:00 CST): still awaiting 3/22 03:00 run. consecutiveErrors=1 stale from 3/16.

signal: Thread归档 cron (ebd691f8) timeout=300s, but 3/20 investigation proved ZAI glm-5-turbo can hang 4+ minutes (4m3s blank gap). Same failure class as ct_043 (feed-broadcast).
action: Bumped timeout 300→600s. Same mitigation pattern as ct_043. Typical runs ~27s, so 600s provides ~22x safety margin while preventing rare ZAI slowdowns from triggering abort.
evidence_170: 4+ runs since fix, all ok (lastDuration 20s). Trending toward convergence. Verify at evt_171.

signal: Thread归档 cron agent reads SKILL.md from wrong path (/root/.openclaw/workspace/skills/...) every run. 84 ENOENT errors over 3 days (3/19: 29, 3/20: 44, 3/21: 11). Root cause: cron prompt said '从 system prompt 的 <available_skills> 中找到' but with lightContext:true the agent can't parse available_skills and guesses wrong path.
action: Updated cron prompt to use explicit path (/data/code/github.com/best/openclaw-skills/discord-thread-archiver/SKILL.md), matching pattern used by feed-collect/score/broadcast cron jobs.
evidence_170: Cron prompt updated at ~20:01 CST. 0 ENOENT errors since 17:01 CST. But first full run under new prompt pending at 21:05 CST. True verification starts now.

signal: Feed-score cron (802b31b9) failed with 'Write failed: Missing required parameter: path'. ZAI glm-5-turbo dropped the path parameter in a write() call. SKILL.md specifies exact paths; model compliance issue.
action: Tracking — single occurrence, no prompt/skill fix warranted yet. If recurs, consider adding explicit 'always include file_path in write calls' guardrail to cron prompt, or switching model.
